prompt: A young woman lying on a lush field of small white and pink daisies, looking up at the camera. She has fair skin, soft makeup, and dark hair styled in a loose side bun with bangs. She wears a light yellow zip-up top and a black backpack, with sunglasses resting on her head. One hand makes a peace sign near her face while the other holds a trekking pole. Bright natural sunlight, soft shadows, vibrant green background, fresh spring atmosphere, high detail, photorealistic, shallow depth of field.
